description: Complete ADR-2603240130 — all swarm agent behavior driven from YAML definitions, not hardcoded Rust

specs.description: hex-coder runs pre_validate gate before any code generation
specs.given: A workplan step targeting a hex boundary with a YAML workflow containing a pre_validate phase
specs.then: The boundary_check gate runs first; if it fails, code generation is skipped and the error is surfaced

domain_conventions.gate: pre_validate phase has a blocking boundary_check gate in hex-coder.yml

specs.description: hex-coder runs separate inference calls for red, green, and refactor phases
specs.given: A workplan step with a phase-based workflow (red → green → refactor)
specs.then: Three distinct inference calls are made — red (write tests), green (make tests pass), refactor (clean up) — each with phase-specific system prompt context

domain_conventions.phases: red=write failing tests, green=minimal implementation, refactor=clean up
domain_conventions.prompt_key: phase steps from YAML are injected into the system prompt

specs.description: YAML load_strategy drives context assembly for hex-coder
specs.given: A hex-coder.yml with a context.load_strategy specifying L1/L2/L3 levels per scope
specs.when: Context is built for a hex-coder step
specs.then: build_context_from_yaml is used (not the hardcoded build_coder_context), loading files at the YAML-specified levels

specs.description: Token budget from YAML caps context file loading
specs.when: Context is assembled for a code generation step
specs.then: File content is truncated to respect the YAML budget, not the hardcoded MAX_FILE_BYTES constant

domain_conventions.current_bug: MAX_FILE_BYTES is hardcoded to 4096 in supervisor.rs; should read from agent YAML

specs.description: Quality thresholds from YAML are enforced after code generation
specs.given: Agent YAML specifies quality_thresholds (max_lint_warnings, max_file_lines, etc.)
specs.when: Code generation completes for a step
specs.then: evaluate_quality_thresholds is called and violations are logged/reported; blocking violations prevent step completion

specs.description: Agent cardinality from swarm YAML determines how many agents run per role
specs.given: dev-pipeline.yml defines hex-coder with cardinality: per_workplan_step
specs.when: A swarm runs for a workplan with 4 steps
specs.then: The supervisor instantiates one hex-coder pass per workplan step (respecting per_workplan_step cardinality)

specs.description: pre_validate gate failure stops code generation and surfaces the error
specs.given: The boundary_check gate fails (code imports an adapter from another adapter)
specs.when: dispatch_agent runs pre_validate for a step
specs.then: Code generation is not called; the gate failure message is included in the step error; the step is marked failed

specs.description: Phase inference failure falls back gracefully without crashing the pipeline
specs.given: The red-phase inference call returns an error (network, model unavailable)
specs.when: Phase-driven dispatch executes the red phase
specs.then: The error is logged and the pipeline either retries via FixAgent or marks the step failed — it does not panic

specs.description: Agent with no phase workflow still gets YAML model + context (no regression)
specs.given: A role (hex-reviewer, hex-tester) with a step-based workflow (not phase-based)
specs.then: YAML model selection is used and context is built correctly — existing behavior is not broken

specs.description: hex dev end-to-end runs a full YAML-driven pipeline without fallback to hardcoded behavior
specs.given: A workplan with 2+ steps, hex-nexus running, all agent YAMLs present
specs.then: All phases execute (pre_validate, red, green, refactor), feedback gates run, FixAgent is called on failures, and the model used matches the hex-coder.yml preferred model
